description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a matte black finish and a large, high-resolution display. The keyboard features RGB backlighting, illuminating each key with a spectrum of colors, and the touchpad is positioned below the keyboard, slightly offset to the left. The screen is open and displays a faint, colorful interface, suggesting the device is powered on. The exterior surfaces are smooth and sleek, with no visible branding or stickers on the lid or palm rest. The laptop's profile is thin, and the hinge mechanism is minimalistic, contributing to its streamlined appearance. No ports or connectors are visible in the provided views.
description: A sleek, matte black laptop with an RGB-backlit keyboard and a large, open display. The design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible branding or stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open display with faint content, RGB-backlit keyboard, and a large touchpad below the keyboard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile and the thinness of the display and base.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, matte black lid with no visible branding or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the thinness and the RGB keyboard lighting.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and powered on, displaying faint content or interface.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with RGB backlighting, function row present, no numeric keypad visible.
